programme.title: Digg
programme.desc: Det er skolestart på Rosenholm videregående, og de nye førsteklassingene må gjennom flere ritualer som skal ha mye å si for det sosiale livet på skolen. Frida starter i første sammen med bestevennen Selma, og blir raskt kjent med Nadja som er sammen med Emil i tredje. Alt er spennende og nytt, ikke minst de beryktede festene, hvor tredjeklassingene inviterer de peneste nykommerne. Frida må på audition og blir raskt kjempepopulær, men snart går alt over styr når Frida og Emil begynner å få følelser for hverandre.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Ekteparet Abbie og Charlie har trekantplaner. Chrissie søker kjæreste nummer fire.

programme.title: Der ondskapen bor
programme.desc: Da Lori McLeod falt for FBI-agenten Scott Kimball, trodde hun han ville beskytte familien hennes. Hun ante ikke hvilke hemmeligheter han skjulte før det var for sent.

programme.title: Min nabo er morder
programme.desc: Den fredelige fasaden i amerikanske småbyer slår sprekker når mørke hemmeligheter fra virkeligheten avsløres.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: En lokal innbygger i Algona, Iowa, kommer over en varebil med liket av en ung mor inni. Etterforskerne undersøker kvinnens siste bevegelser i håp om å finne morderen.

programme.title: Drømmen om et øyliv
programme.sub-title: Outdoor Family Time in Key West
programme.desc: Et aktivt par forlater det travle Pittsburg-området til fordel for en avslappet livsstil i Key West i Florida. De ønsker seg en eiendom i nærheten av både byen og stranda, og med to små barn, trenger de minst tre soverom og hage.

programme.title: Drømmen om et øyliv
programme.sub-title: Fishing for a New Life on Merritt Island
programme.desc: En familie på fire ønsker å bytte ut Seattles ståk og bråk med et liv i vannkanten på Merritt Island i Florida. Barna vil ha basseng, men foreldrene mener de trenger en stor hage til hundene og plass nok til at alle kan leke.

programme.title: Drømmen om et øyliv
programme.desc: Fitness-entusiaster leter etter en eiendom i vannkanten i Orange Beach i Alabama. De ser etter noe som er ferdig møblert med direkte adgang til trening på stranda.

programme.title: Gift ved første blikk
programme.desc: I denne sesongen skal hele seks par gifte seg. Etter bryllupsreisen flytter de inn i hver sin leilighet i en bygård i Oslo. Her blir det felles middager og jevnlige bekreftelsesseremonier, hvor parene velger om de vil bli eller dra hjem. I dag blir det mye følelser når to av parene møtes for aller første gang i eget bryllup.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: En tidligere snekker og hans forlovede er på utkikk etter drømmehjemmet ved kysten av Maine. De ønsker en liten hage, skrivestudio og nærhet til havet.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: Etter å ha vunnet $4 millioner på et skrapelodd, kan en mor og hennes datter flytte ut av deres en-roms leilighet og inn i et vakkert hjem i Cape Cod.

programme.title: Flipp eller flopp?
programme.desc: Tarek og Christina setter i gang et prosjekt i en ny by, men usikkerheten rundt hva kjøperne i området er ute etter fører til krangler om omfanget og uttrykket for huset.

programme.title: Flipp eller flopp?
programme.desc: Tarek og Christina kjøper et hus i Lakewood i California, i nærheten av sitt forrige prosjekt. De håper å gjenta suksessen fra sist, men å modernisere et gammelt hus kommer med en høy kostnad.

programme.title: Oppussing i hjembyen
programme.sub-title: From Windy City To City Beautiful
programme.desc: Etter å ha bodd i utkanten av Chicago de siste 30 årene, ønsker et par å vende tilbake til sine Mississippi-røtter for å få et roligere liv. Ben og Erin presenterer to hus for dem, og det ene har noe spesielt som Erin tror de ikke vil kunne motstå.

programme.title: Mor og datter pusser opp
programme.desc: Mina og teamet tar fatt på sitt første hjem i Valley, som er et nytt nabolag for dem. Men uten kjennskap til området og med store utfordringer, må Mina passe på hvis hun vil ha avkastning på denne risikable investeringen.

programme.title: Fabelaktig oppussing
programme.desc: Dave og Jenny Marrs forvandler et hus fra 1893 til et familiedrømmehjem. Loftet blir soverom og hjemmekontor og nede blir stua totalrenovert.

programme.title: Sinnasnekkern
programme.sub-title: Drammen, del 1: Svein Helge og Lene Madelen
programme.desc: Lene og Svein Helge bor i hans gamle barndomshjem i Drammen. De har aldri fullført noen av oppussingsprosjektene de har startet på, og nå begynner ting å forfalle. Taket er så dårlig at det lekker vann inn i stua, og andre etasje, der barna sover, ser ikke ut. Eldstedatteren synes det er så flaut å bo i et slikt hus at hun ønsker å flytte ut.

programme.title: Alle mot alle
programme.desc: Det ene laget leder finalen med ett fattig poeng. Hvem stikker av med pokalen til slutt?

programme.title: Husfikserne
programme.desc: Chip og Joanna Gaines hjelper klienten Dr. Marla Hendricks å finne et hjem i Wako til henne og hennes nye ektemann.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: En Boston-kvinne vant hele 25 millioner dollar på skrapelodd! Hun ønsker å kjøpe et drømmehjem til hvert av sine voksne barn, og ber David om hjelp.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: En kvinne som har vært avhengig av hjelp fra venner og familie, får en overraskende forliksordning. Hun trenger et passende sted for sin funksjonshemmede ektemann, og David er klar til å finne drømmehjemmet deres i Fort Pierce, Florida.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: En mann fra Colorado ønsker å kjøpe et hus til storesøsteren sin og hennes to barn etter å ha vunnet penger. Nå kommer David for å hjelpe med å finne det perfekte hjemmet i Pueblo, Colorado.

programme.title: Sinnasnekkern
programme.sub-title: Drammen, del 2: Svein Helge og Lene Madelen
programme.desc: Vi er fortsatt hos Lene og Svein Helge i Drammen. Her går ting fremover, og paret jobber på. Selv om de kløner en del, ser det ut til at de har fått tilbake gnisten for å gjøre det fint rundt seg. Nå er det på tide at Otto involverer eldstedatteren så hun også kan få sette sitt eget preg på huset.

programme.title: Montebello camping
programme.desc: Eva (92) er en av Montebellos aller mest trofaste campere og har fast adresse på plassen. Vaktmester Sverre, daglig leder Lars Christian og plassanviser Tom slår seg sammen for å overraske Eva. Ulf Arne og Bernadeta drar på utflukt til et lokalt kunstgalleri der de får servert skumle historier om mystiske hendelser på galleriet mens Per Arild og Grete får familiebesøk.

programme.title: Luftambulansen UK
programme.desc: En motorsyklist kjemper for å overleve, og Dr. Neil må gjøre veikanten om til en operasjonsstue. Og en lastebilsjåfør faller ut av lastebilen.

programme.title: Renoveringsdrømmer Sverige
programme.desc: Hestegårdens brønn fortsetter å skape problemer. I Sørgården bytter Marie alle vinduene og Ninni og Christians kjøkken i den nye leiligheten er endelig ferdig.

programme.title: Første date Australia
programme.desc: Savannah er forelsket i Chad, men er han for ung? Vil «Første date» bli realitystjernen Mels redning?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Biseksuelle Lauren ser etter en nerdete gamer. Ryan håper på å finne sin sølvrev.

programme.title: Der ondskapen bor
programme.desc: Kat Harris og Marla Kreuger elsket begge Lawrence Harris. De avfeide hans mørke besettelse som merkelig, og ingen av dem innså at han ville ofre uskyldige liv.

programme.title: Ditt verste mareritt
programme.desc: En seriemorder er på ferde, og Adriane Fields lurer på om hun er neste på listen. Hun er livredd og flytter, men ender opp ansikt til ansikt med sitt mareritt.

programme.title: Min nabo er morder
programme.desc: En undersøkende serie med historier fra virkeligheten om folk som har forsvunnet fra sine lokalsamfunn på mistenkelig vis, for så å bli funnet brutalt drept av noen de kjente.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: Når Alyce Seffs lik blir funnet i en ønskebrønn, oppdager etterforskerne at den eldre husvertinnen hadde like mange fiender som venner.

programme.title: Forbrytelsene som rystet USA
programme.desc: I 1982 kommer en mann hjem og finner kona si død med en øks i hodet. Byen lever i frykt for en morder til det endelig skjer en arrestasjon flere tiår senere.

programme.title: Der ondskapen bor
programme.desc: Kat Harris og Marla Kreuger elsket begge Lawrence Harris. De avfeide hans mørke besettelse som merkelig, og ingen av dem innså at han ville ofre uskyldige liv.

programme.title: Drømmen om et øyliv
programme.sub-title: White Picket Fence Vibes on Gulf Shores
programme.desc: En high school-rektor flytter tilbake til Gulf Shores i Alabama for å kjøpe et permanent hjem. Hun søker etter en avslappet stemning, og med hjelp av datteren, håper hun å finne et hjem i hytte-stil med mye karakter i nærheten av stranda.

programme.title: Drømmen om et øyliv
programme.sub-title: A New Start in Gulf Shores
programme.desc: Barndomskjærester er klare til å flytte nærmere stranda i Gulf Shores i Alabama. De ser etter fire soverom og stor hage. Mor ønsker å være i nærheten av stranda for å se vakre solnedganger, men far vet at det koster.

programme.title: Gift ved første blikk
programme.desc: Vi blir med på to nye bryllup. Her blir det nerver, smil, tårer og glede. Og en bryllupsfest hvor nye sider allerede avsløres for de nygifte. To par drar på bryllupsreise til Lofoten og Spania, noe som byr på både utfordringer, nærhet og morsomme aktiviteter. Det åpnes også opp for samtaler som knytter parene nærmere sammen.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: En kvinne som har vært avhengig av hjelp fra venner og familie, får en overraskende forliksordning. Hun trenger et passende sted for sin funksjonshemmede ektemann, og David er klar til å finne drømmehjemmet deres i Fort Pierce, Florida.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: En mann fra Colorado ønsker å kjøpe et hus til storesøsteren sin og hennes to barn etter å ha vunnet penger. Nå kommer David for å hjelpe med å finne det perfekte hjemmet i Pueblo, Colorado.

programme.title: Flipp eller flopp?
programme.desc: Tarek og Christina tar sjansen på et stort hus i Anaheim Hills i California, i håp om å få stor fortjeneste. Men først må de bruke mye penger på oppgraderingen.

programme.title: Flipp eller flopp?
programme.desc: Tarek og Christina kjøper hus i Yorba Linda i California. De bruker mye penger på å fjerne en peis, men når Tarek går bak ryggen på Christina og forandrer flisdesignet, fikser hun den nye peisen på egenhånd.

programme.title: Oppussing i hjembyen
programme.desc: Etter å ha gått gjennom tøffe tider, er en ung familie klar til å slå røtter og bli en del av det pulserende samfunnet Laurel. Ben og Erin viser dem to hus i to vidt forskjellige nabolag, ett på landet og et større sted i byen.

programme.title: Mor og datter pusser opp
programme.desc: Mina pusser opp hjemmet til den profesjonelle basketballspilleren Justin Holiday og hans familie. I håp om å utvide virksomheten sin, er Minas mål å gjøre dette utdaterte herskapshuset til en moderne oase før Justins sesong begynner.

programme.title: Fabelaktig oppussing
programme.sub-title: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift
programme.desc: Dave og Jenny Marrs hjelper en kvinne å forvandle hjemmet sitt til et vakkert, viktoriansk sted å slappe av. Men stue, kjøkken, soverom og terrasse lider av uferdig snekkerarbeid.

programme.title: Sinnasnekkern
programme.sub-title: Drammen, del 2: Svein Helge og Lene Madelen
programme.desc: Vi er fortsatt hos Lene og Svein Helge i Drammen. Her går ting fremover, og paret jobber på. Selv om de kløner en del, ser det ut til at de har fått tilbake gnisten for å gjøre det fint rundt seg. Nå er det på tide at Otto involverer eldstedatteren så hun også kan få sette sitt eget preg på huset.

programme.title: Alle mot alle
programme.desc: Sesongen åpner med en ren familiekamp, det er Katrine og Evelina Moholt i det ene buret, mot Christian og Isabelle Ringnes i det andre. Denne sesongen består av kun splitter nye lag, fulle av nerver, overraskende kunnskap og sist men ikke minst, masse konkurranseinstinkt.

programme.title: Husfikserne
programme.desc: Nybakte foreldre legger press på Chip og Jo Gaines for å få prosjektet ferdig.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: Lottovinnere har vokst ut av drømmehjemmet sitt i California, og ønsker seg et større sted i forstedene til Las Vegas! De ser etter mye uteplass, men for David kan det være en utfordring å finne et hjem i Vegas med en stor nok tomt.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: Etter å ha skrapt fram en jackpot på 100 000 dollar, er en kvinne fra Sarasota endelig klar til å komme seg ut av leieboligen og inn i et drømmehjem. Hun ber David om hjelp til å finne noe romslig nær hvite sandstrender.

programme.title: Lottomillionærenes husjakt
programme.desc: Livet tok en uventet vending da et par fra Long Island flyttet til Nord-Carolina. Men etter en rekke tilbakeslag kom et vendepunkt med en arv fra hennes avdøde mor, som ga dem sjansen til å starte på nytt.

programme.title: Sinnasnekkern
programme.desc: Otto er tilbake hos familier han har vært hos tidligere. Han er selvsagt spent på å se hvordan det går med parene, og ikke minst om de har klart å holde koken i oppussingen. I denne episoden går turen til Linda Jeanette og Kåre i Askim, Tina og barna i Porsgrunn og Tonje og Andre på Mogreina.

programme.title: Montebello camping
programme.desc: Preben og Joachim får et uventet problem og Snefrid skravler i vei om ugla som krasja i vinduet, roseknoppspisende rådyr, grevlingen som nesten gravde seg gjennom gulvet deres og mye mer. Svogerne Roy og Roger tar med seg campingveteranen Ørjan på fisketur, og en gjeng ræggere fra Sverige ankommer Montebello på jakt etter bruder, grilling og kortspill.

programme.title: Luftambulansen UK
programme.desc: En mann tar desperate grep for å redde broren sin etter en ulykke på en BMX-sykkel. En golfspiller kollapser, og teamet starter gjenoppliving.

programme.title: Renoveringsdrømmer Sverige
programme.desc: I kirken jobber Ottilia og Jimmy for å få rommet til sønnen Edvin klart til bursdagen. På hestegården oppstår det problemer med kjøkkenrenoveringen.

programme.title: Beliggenhet, beliggenhet, beliggenhet
programme.desc: Kristin de Jesus drømmer om å pensjonere seg i et «Skomakergata-hus». Influenceren Anny Isabella får seg en realitetsjekk på hva hun kan forvente seg i storbyen og megler Karianne trekker frem alle sine beste triks når Vibeke og Henriks leilighet går i budrunde.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Finner Skyla sin glitrende venn i en av podene? Kan den biseksuelle transmannen Zeus finne den rette?

programme.title: Der ondskapen bor
programme.desc: De fleste så på Aziza Ayinde Kibbibis far som en suksessrik regissør av musikkvideoer. Men for henne var han et motbydelig monster som gjorde grufulle ting i Guds navn.

programme.title: Ditt verste mareritt
programme.desc: Når advokatassistenten Gail Spencer ikke kommer på jobb, blir kollegene bekymret. Det viser seg at hun har blitt bortført - vet noen på kontoret mer enn de sier?

programme.title: Min nabo er morder
programme.desc: Etter at Jeans eksmann blir anklaget for å ha misbrukt deres døtre seksuelt, blir hun og døtrene henrettet. Står Ernie bak denne julemassakren?

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: Julen blir trist når fjellvandrere i New Mexico oppdager Roxanne Houstons grunne grav. Politiet mener det er et mord, men sliter med å finne en mistenkt.

programme.title: Forbrytelsene som rystet USA
programme.desc: I 2007 blir en 19 år gammel kvinne brutalt drept i den lille byen Winnsboro i Texas. Under etterforskningen kommer noen av byens mørkeste hemmeligheter fram i lyset.

programme.title: MEGA Fights
programme.sub-title: Carlos Manuel Baldomir vs. Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights Carlos Manuel Baldomir, aka Tata (42-9, 12 KOs) vs. Arturo Thunder Gatti (40-7, 31 KOs) in a bout to unify the WBC and IBA titles. The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 22, 2006. A total of 12,763 people sold out the arena for this bout which wound up being one of the last ones Arturo Gatti would compete in.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60
programme.sub-title: Floyd Mayweather, Jr. vs. Ricky Hatton
programme.desc: MEGA FIGHTS are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing, historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a match-up between undefeated welterweights loyd Mayweather, Jr., aka Money Pretty Boy, (38-0, 24 KOs) and Ricky The Hitman Hatton (43-0, 31 KOs) from the MGM Grand, Grand Garden Arena, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA on December 8, 2007. Who will be handed their first career loss?

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS!
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the 21-0 James Kirkland facing off with the 21-1 Eromosele Albert. Just a little over a minute into this bout, following a combination of punches, the bout comes to a close.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 features Chiyotairyu, Aoiyama, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights
programme.desc: This episode features a Heavyweight bout between the unpredictable and unbeaten Tyson Fury as we works his way up the ranks taking on former champ Steve Cunningham, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.sub-title: Randy Couture, Ronda Rousey, Arianny Celeste and more!
programme.desc: This episode features two-time UFC champion and Hall of Famer Randy "The Natural" Couture and his buddies firing up their motorcycles for a good cause, plus an interview with one of MMAs biggest stars, "Rowdy" Ronda Rousey. Weve got another installment of the gun store challenge this time with Thiago Alves, plus we go behind the scenes for a photo shoot with ring girl Arianny Celeste, exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features Amanda "MadDog" Lino vs. Manon Fiorot from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights
programme.sub-title: Carlos Manuel Baldomir vs. Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights Carlos Manuel Baldomir, aka Tata (42-9, 12 KOs) vs. Arturo Thunder Gatti (40-7, 31 KOs) in a bout to unify the WBC and IBA titles. The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 22, 2006. A total of 12,763 people sold out the arena for this bout which wound up being one of the last ones Arturo Gatti would compete in.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60
programme.sub-title: Floyd Mayweather, Jr. vs. Ricky Hatton
programme.desc: MEGA FIGHTS are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing, historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a match-up between undefeated welterweights loyd Mayweather, Jr., aka Money Pretty Boy, (38-0, 24 KOs) and Ricky The Hitman Hatton (43-0, 31 KOs) from the MGM Grand, Grand Garden Arena, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA on December 8, 2007. Who will be handed their first career loss?

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS!
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the 21-0 James Kirkland facing off with the 21-1 Eromosele Albert. Just a little over a minute into this bout, following a combination of punches, the bout comes to a close.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 features Chiyotairyu, Aoiyama, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights
programme.desc: This episode features a Heavyweight bout between the unpredictable and unbeaten Tyson Fury as we works his way up the ranks taking on former champ Steve Cunningham, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Introducing
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS Presents Introducing:, a new original documentary series that covers the current stars of today and rising stars of tomorrow. Each episode we get an up close and personal perspective of their lives and see what drives them to be the best at what they do. Introducing: Caitlin Dechelle, provides an intimate look at one of the most dominant women in the history of martial arts tournaments. From tragedy to triumph to Hollywood, we see what has made Caitlin Dechelle become a real life Wonder Woman of today.

programme.title: Return to the Ring
programme.desc: Delivering the untold stories behind some of the most exciting fights in the sport, FIGHT SPORTS brings you Return to the Ring. In this original documentary series, we sit with the participants from some of boxings most interesting bouts, including the fighters, trainers, officials and promoters that contributed to each event. First, we relive the action from two incredible fights between Light Heavyweights Rocky Gannon and Dominick Carter, who fought in one of the best rounds of boxing throughout the decade of the 1990s. Gannon and Carter, as well as referee Laurence Cole and promoter Les Bonano, give their unique perspective on the fights and all the controversy that followed.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles Sonny Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: Dead hot
programme.desc: Elliot a fini par retrouver Will, et pourtant, plusieurs questions restent sans reponse. Jess craint que son amitie avec Elliot ne survive pas. Elle-meme sacoquine avec Tina. Aussi, la tension entre les deux meilleurs amis est-elle à son comble. Se peut-il que ce soit la fin dune belle histoire ?

programme.title: Dead hot
programme.desc: Sans Jess, Elliott fait appel à d’autres amis pour resoudre un meurtre.

programme.title: Dead hot
programme.desc: Elliott et Jess survivront-ils assez longtemps pour eclaircir les mysterieuses circonstances impliquant leurs proches?

programme.title: Rue des Dames
programme.desc: À Paris, Mia, 25 ans, travaille dans un salon de manucure. Sa vie bascule lorsquelle decouvre quelle est enceinte, alors meme que sa situation financière est fragile. Entre la recherche dun logement et son compagnon, Nabil, en liberte conditionnelle, Mia se retrouve à court de solutions. Pour sen sortir, elle se lance dans une magouille qui mele des clientes du salon, des soirees privees et Djibril, une celèbre star du football….

programme.title: Mot de passe : le duel
programme.desc: Mot de passe - Le Duel est un jeu qui consiste à faire deviner des mots à un partenaire de jeu en donnant des mots indices. Il se joue avec deux candidats face à deux celebrites. Du lundi au jeudi, ce sont les Duels et la Finale se joue en fin de semaine, le vendredi, avec le meilleur des 2 candidats et les deux celebrites.

programme.title: Le 6h info
programme.desc: Un rendez-vous reveil-matin, avec un point sur lactualite assorti de differentes rubriques qui permettent den explorer certains aspects plus en profondeur.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: De linfo et de la bonne humeur, sept jours sur sept : resolument dans lair du temps, la première matinale de France, forte de sa richesse editoriale et de sa dynamique dequipe, aborde de nombreuses thematiques et traite lactualite avec serieux et sans dramatisation.

programme.title: Journal 08h00
programme.desc: Pour bien demarrer la journee, la redaction de France 2 propose un point sur lactualite. Les principales informations nationales et internationales sont passees en revue.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: De linfo et de la bonne humeur, sept jours sur sept : resolument dans lair du temps, la première matinale de France, forte de sa richesse editoriale et de sa dynamique dequipe, aborde de nombreuses thematiques et traite lactualite avec serieux et sans dramatisation.

programme.title: Bel and Bien ensemble
programme.desc: Agathe Lecaron, Sarah Kaddour et Arnaud Lauque : un trio complice. À trois, ils forment un trio equilibre et bienveillant qui fait la part belle à lecoute et à la curiosite afin que chacun puisse sexprimer de façon authentique et spontanee. Des experts, des invites et beaucoup de partage Chaque semaine, des specialistes nous accompagnent et nous aident à mieux apprehender les thematiques abordees. Medecins, coachs, psychologues, nutritionnistes… les invites presents sur le plateau nous racontent leurs histoires et nous offrent des solutions concrètes simples à appliquer pour gagner en qualite de vie. Leurs informations pertinentes complètent parfaitement ces moments dechange en direct avec le public.

programme.title: Journal Meteo climat outre-mer

programme.title: Ça commence aujourdhui
programme.sub-title: A force de harcèlement, ils les ont poussees au suicide
programme.desc: Tous les jours, Faustine BOLLAERT accueille sur le plateau de " Ca commence aujourdhui " des hommes et des femmes qui viennent temoigner sur une periode de leur vie, un drame, une epreuve, un cap à passer ou un changement, et qui font souvent echo à de grands sujets de societe. Entouree dexperts : psychologues, psychiatres, avocats, gynecologue, Faustine aide les temoins et les telespectateurs à mieux comprendre ce quils ont vecu.

programme.title: Ça commence aujourdhui
programme.sub-title: Amour, amitie : une femme leur a tendu un piège
programme.desc: Des invites qui se sont fait arnaquer, berner ou meme pieger par une femme dans laquelle ils avaient pourtant entièrement confiance temoignent.

programme.title: Affaire conclue : la vie des objets
programme.desc: Parce que les maisons sont remplies de babioles insolites qui ne demandent quà trouver acquereurs, des specialistes accompagnent les proprietaires dobjets tout au long des etapes susceptibles de les mener à la vente.

programme.title: Affaire conclue
programme.desc: Julia Vignali accueillera et accompagnera les proprietaires dobjets lors de leur expertise par lun de nos commissaires-priseurs. En accord avec lestimation de lexpert, Julia Vignali remettra un Pass au proprietaire, precieux sesame pour se presenter en salle des ventes devant nos acheteurs. Le vendeur pourra esperer tirer le meilleur prix de son objet en le vendant aux enchères à une selection dacheteurs venus des 4 coins de la France, de Suisse et de Belgique. Antiquaires, brocanteurs, collectionneurs, marchands darts, professionnels, nos acheteurs constituent les meilleurs specialistes. Avec leur propre argent, ils pourront surencherir pour le plus grand benefice du vendeur. Sils parviennent à un accord, cest la garantie pour le vendeur de repartir avec le produit de sa vente et pour lacheteur de trouver un objet unique !

programme.title: La 37e Ceremonie des Molières
programme.desc: Au theâtre des Folies Bergère, à Paris. La 37e ceremonie des Molières, animee par Alex Vizorek, met à lhonneur les talents de la creation theâtrale de la saison 2024-2025 à travers 19 categories, parmi lesquelles les Molières du Theâtre public et prive, ceux de le Comedie, de la Creation visuelle et sonore, du Spectacle musical, de lHumour, du Jeune public, du Seul.e en scène, du Comedien et de la Comedienne, de la Mise en scène, des Revelations masculines et feminines.

programme.title: Bungalow 21
programme.desc: En 1960, deux couples mythiques sejournent au Beverly Hills Hotel de Los Angeles. Dans le bungalow 20 logent les Français Simone Signoret et Yves Montand : ils saiment, ils sont beaux, encore jeunes, pleins de vie, au faîte de leur gloire. Mais Marilyn Monroe, installee dans le bungalow voisin, au numero 21, est une femme irresistible, au charme etourdissant, dont le couple avec le celèbre ecrivain Arthur Miller bat serieusement de laile.

programme.desc: Mathilde, enquetrice de la PJ, se rend sur le parvis de lhôpital où Judith, 7 ans, vient detre enlevee, malgre son etat de sante preoccupant.

programme.title: Bel and Bien ensemble
programme.desc: Agathe Lecaron, Sarah Kaddour et Arnaud Lauque : un trio complice. À trois, ils forment un trio equilibre et bienveillant qui fait la part belle à lecoute et à la curiosite afin que chacun puisse sexprimer de façon authentique et spontanee. Des experts, des invites et beaucoup de partage Chaque semaine, des specialistes nous accompagnent et nous aident à mieux apprehender les thematiques abordees. Medecins, coachs, psychologues, nutritionnistes… les invites presents sur le plateau nous racontent leurs histoires et nous offrent des solutions concrètes simples à appliquer pour gagner en qualite de vie. Leurs informations pertinentes complètent parfaitement ces moments dechange en direct avec le public.

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau
programme.desc: Un apprenti serrurier, Antoine, est tue dans un centre de formation pour artisans. Le meurtrier vient-il de lexterieur, ou de linterieur du centre? Marleau sinteresse de près à Maëlle, brillante apprentie en horlogerie, une "itinerante" comme elle.

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau
programme.desc: La capitaine Marleau herite dune nouvelle enquete. Un homme, qui travaillait dans un parc dattractions, a ete assassine. La victime etait le père dun adolescent. Le jeune homme, qui se retrouve seul, pourrait etre recueilli par Antoine et Lucie, les proprietaires du parc. Le couple a en effet fait part de son intention dadopter lorphelin. Au cours de ses investigations, Marleau decouvre que ce nest pas la première fois quun drame se produit sur les lieux...

programme.title: Au bout de lenquete, la fin du crime parfait ?
programme.sub-title: Affaire Marie-France Lacazedieu : Une famille en enfer
programme.desc: Marie-France Lacazedieu, 63 ans, a tente dassassiner ses deux petits-enfants de 10 et 12 ans, ainsi que son compagnon. Elle avait drogue leur repas et mis le feu à la maison.

programme.title: Au bout de lenquete, la fin du crime parfait ?
programme.desc: Au bout de lenquete, la fin du crime parfait ? Ce magazine sinteresse aux "Cold case". Des affaires classees, reputees insolubles, qui ont parfois resiste près de 50 ans à la tenacite des enqueteurs avant quun indice, un temoignage inespere ou une expertise scientifique innovante ne permettent de confondre les coupables.

programme.title: Little Girl Blue
programme.desc: À la mort de sa mère, Mona Achache decouvre des milliers de photos, lettres et enregistrements, mais ces secrets enfouis resistent à lenigme de sa disparition. Pour mieux la comprendre , la realisatrice demande à Marion Cotillard dincarner cette mère disparue et interroge ainsi son histoire.

programme.title: Inspecteur Barnaby
programme.sub-title: La mort nest pas un jeu
programme.desc: Viktor Karras, riche fabriquant de jeux de societe, fete son anniversaire en grande pompe dans son manoir, sur une île. Une murder party est organisee pour loccasion et à peine un premier crime est-il simule quun deuxième meurtre, bien reel, lui, est commis.

programme.title: Inspecteur Barnaby
programme.desc: Lors du Festival des Epouvantails de Causton, le cadavre de Naomi Ashworth, est decouvert installe dans la vitrine de son magasin dantiquites, couvert de paille. Naomi netait pas uniquement une commerçante locale. Elle travaillait aussi comme specialiste des relations publiques pour le casino en ligne de sa meilleure amie, Adèle Paige. Se peut-il que son meurtee ait un rapport avec le casino ? Au fil de son enquete, linspecteur Barnaby ne tarde pas à decouvrir un fait tout à fait inhabituel : la victime etait payee pour mener des campagnes de denigrement. De quoi allonger considerablement sa liste de suspects.

programme.title: Journal Meteo climat
programme.desc: Le point quotidien sur lactualite meteo et climatique, avec des reportages et des interviews dexperts.

programme.title: La carte aux tresors
programme.sub-title: La Meurthe-et-Moselle et le Grand Nancy
programme.desc: Cyril Feraud et toute lequipe se rendent en Meurthe-et-Moselle. La zone de jeu setend le long de la Moselle, de Briey au nord jusquà Baccarat au sud, en passant par Pont-à-Mousson, Nancy, Toul, et le lac de Pierre-Percee. Les deux candidats, Adelaïde et Vianney, devront resoudre des enigmes et relever des defis pour retrouver les fameuses capsules cachees dans cette vaste zone, et esperer atteindre le Tresor. Au programme de cette nouvelle aventure : la visite de lieux dexception où le feu transforme la matière, illustrant un savoir-faire verrier et ceramique qui fait la fierte de la region, une plongee à Nancy, berceau de lArt Nouveau, et une exploration des immenses fortifications construites avant la Première Guerre mondiale, vestiges dun système defensif qui fut, à son epoque, le plus important du monde.

programme.title: Escales en France
programme.sub-title: La Bretagne côte mer et côte terre
programme.desc: Focus sur celles et ceux, en France qui preservent le patrimoine, les monuments, la faune et la flore. Rencontre egalement avec Yann Arthus Bertrand.

programme.title: Cosy, le mag deco
programme.desc: Une production France Televisions Production executive : Wide Productions Realise par Damien Pourageaux.

programme.title: Les matinales
programme.desc: Programme de musique classique pour se reveiller en douceur.

programme.title: Questions pour un champion
programme.desc: Un jeu realise par Olivier Baudoin et Karl Grosse Produit par Fremantle, avec la participation de France 3 Anime par Samuel Etienne Jeu emblematique construit autour de la culture generale, lemission culte "Questions pour un champion" se deroule en trois manches : - Le "9 points gagnants" lors de laquelle la rapidite est de mise. - Le "4 à la suite" où dans un temps de 40 secondes maximum, le but est de donner 4 bonnes reponses à la suite sur un thème choisi. - Et le "Face-à-face

programme.title: Homard et cordon bleu
programme.desc: Une production M Com Marguerite et France 3 Bretagne Realise par Magalie Douarche Avec le chef Sylvain Guillemot Le chef etoile Sylvain Guillemot sinvite dans les cuisines de sa region bretonne, ouvre placards et frigos et relève le defi de concocter un plat de chef en 20 minutes. Peu importe quils soient ferus de cuisine ou non, limportant est davoir envie de se preter au jeu dune recette à quatre mains.

programme.title: ICI Matin
programme.desc: De 6h30 à 9h, " Ici Matin " est votre premier rendez-vous de la journee avec linformation de proximite. Elle ouvre les matinees 100 % regionales de France 3. Au programme, des journaux dinformation en hyper proximite tous les quarts dheure, des points meteo et trafic reguliers, de linteractivite avec les auditeurs et telespectateurs, et surtout une grande bouffee de bonne humeur pour demarrer la journee du bon pied !

programme.title: On vous emmène ici
programme.desc: Une production par les redactions regionales de France 3 Presente en alternance par Raphaëlle Tavernier et Gregoire Bouscambert Chaque jour, on prendra le temps… Le temps dun reportage pour raconter nos territoires, sarreter dans un site remarquable, un lieu emblematique, un patrimoine à decouvrir.

programme.title: ICI dans votre region
programme.desc: Des magazines ou documentaires proposes par votre antenne regionale.

programme.title: La ptite librairie
programme.desc: François Busnel propose chaque jour de decouvrir ou redecouvrir une œuvre française ou etrangère : roman, essai, grand classique ou encore bande dessinee.

programme.title: Homard et cordon bleu
programme.desc: Recette : Roules de filets de poulet, carottes et courgettes, quinoa dasperges fraîches et salade dherbes. Notre chef etoile Sylvain Guillemot sinvite dans la cuisine de Suzie, une jeune passionnee de 16 ans, à Rennes. À la maison, Suzie est aux manettes dans la cuisine, tandis que son père soccupe du jardin aromatique qui enrichit leurs plats. Au menu, des filets de poulet delicatement enroules dans des carottes et des courgettes, accompagnes de quinoa, dasperges fraîches et dune salade dherbes cueillies directement du jardin. Suzie, dotee dun caractère bien trempe et dune grande determination, a un avenir prometteur dans la cuisine ! Produit par m com marguerite.

programme.desc: Une production RandG Productions "Flavie en France

programme.title: Meteo à la carte
programme.desc: Une emission realisee par Captain Productions Une production Enibas Productions, A Prime Group, avec la participation de France Televisions Redacteurs en chef : Stephane Evanno et Laetitia Bouchon Presentee par Marine Vignes et Laurent Romejko En direct "Meteo à la carte

programme.title: Meteo à la carte (la suite)
programme.desc: Une emission realisee par Captain Productions Une production Enibas Productions, A Prime Group, avec la participation de France Televisions Redacteurs en chef : Stephane Evanno et Laetitia Bouchon Presentee par Marine Vignes et Laurent Romejko En direct Ce nouveau format se veut encore plus interactif. programme.title: Crimes parfaits
programme.sub-title: Un plat qui se mange froid
programme.desc: Impuissant face au calvaire de sa soeur, Philippe, un chirurgien, decide de se debarrasser de son bourreau de beau-frère et confrère de surcroît.

programme.title: Crimes parfaits
programme.desc: Le commandant Renaud Delaunay et son adjointe, Laura Mizon, vont devoir pieger un meurtrier particulièrement coriace et manipulateur, qui connaît parfaitement les methodes des policiers. Et pour cause, il sagit de Philippe Sevran, juge dinstruction...

programme.title: Crimes parfaits
programme.desc: Renaud Delaunay et son adjointe Laura Mizon enquetent sur le suicide presume dun homme, dont la belle-fille adopte un comportement hautement suspect.

programme.title: Duels en familles
programme.desc: Un jeu realise par Ben Cap Produit par CYRILPROD et A Prime Group Dans un decor dappartement geant, deux familles de quatre membres viennent defendre les couleurs de leur region en saffrontant chaque jour de la semaine, au cours de trois duels et une finale. Au programme : duels en images, duels en regions, duels de mots, duels en musique, duels en culture … Chaque jour, la famille victorieuse se qualifie pour la finale pour tenter de remporter 2000 €. Le vendredi, pour le dernier match de la semaine, cest une grande finale à 5000 € qui attend les candidats. Quelle sera la famille et donc la region gagnante de la semaine ?

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Un jeu realise par Antoine Galey, Patricia Rimond des Anges et Philippe Letourneur Produit par Effervescence Label, avec la participation de France 3 Anime par Theo Curin Accessible à tous les publics, "Slam" est un jeu de lettres 100 % original qui fait la joie des amoureux des mots, des ferus de quiz et des adeptes des mots fleches, en mixant tous les genres, de la geographie aux mathematiques, en passant par la chimie... et bien sûr le français. Au menu : vivacite desprit, humour, vocabulaire, orthographe et bien sûr culture generale !

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Gary se lance dans une nouvelle aventure. De son côte Johanna semble vivre une belle histoire, mais a-t-elle vraiment tourne la page de son mariage ?

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Alors que Nathalie espère encore trouver des reponses à ses questions, Janet est prete à faire un pas en direction de Jeremy.

programme.title: Le voyageur
programme.desc: Yann Kandinsky est contacte par la commissaire Macena, qui a reçu une lettre que seul Kandinsky pouvait prendre au serieux. La lettre a ete ecrite par un certain Michaël, un enfant de 10 ans, lequel supplie la police darreter le monstre qui a enleve plusieurs personnes dans la foret. La proximite de ce dernier interdit à Michaël le sous-bois, ce qui represente un drame pour lui. Enfant solitaire, il y passe, dès quil le peut, toutes ses journees. Michaël, persuade que le monstre habite Murce, son village, suggère à la police denqueter discrètement, pour ne pas eveiller les soupçons.

programme.title: Le voyageur
programme.desc: Kandinsky reçoit la confirmation de ce quil soupçonnait. La commissaire Macena detient la preuve quun seul predateur a bien commis les nombreux crimes non elucides repertories dans le mysterieux cahier trouve dans le van de Bareski. Le "voyageur" met une fois encore ses pas dans ceux de son predecesseur. A laide des indices de Macena et des notes de Bareski, il commence sa traque en Ille-et-Vilaine. Mais, de chasseur, il va bientôt devenir la proie dun redoutable predateur. Car on ne remue pas impunement le passe.

programme.title: Journal Meteo climat
programme.desc: Le point quotidien sur lactualite meteo et climatique, avec des reportages et des interviews dexperts.

programme.title: Flanbo Maloya
programme.desc: A La Reunion, une nouvelle generation de musiciens revisitent le maloya traditionnel - inscrit au Patrimoine culturel immateriel de lhumanite -, et racontent une histoire contemporaine, puisant leur inspiration dans leur île à lidentite plurielle. Le documentaire part à la rencontre de quatre de ces artistes reunionnais, Saodaj, Labelle, Ka Loune et Maya Kamaty : un voyage musical à la decouverte des racines et du patrimoine reunionnais.

programme.title: Renouer le fil de la soie
programme.desc: Pendant plus de 200 ans, la soie et la fabrication de bas ont fait battre leconomie des Cevennes. Mais larrivee du nylon a remplace la soie, le collant a fait passer de mode le bas et la concurrence asiatique a fait pericliter lindustrie textile cevenole. Les savoir-faire et le materiel ont bien failli disparaitre. Des agricultrices, un industriel et des ouvriers, dans le nord du Gard, tentent de relocaliser cette industrie.

programme.title: La ptite librairie
programme.desc: François Busnel propose chaque jour de decouvrir ou redecouvrir une œuvre française ou etrangère : roman, essai, grand classique ou encore bande dessinee.

programme.title: Des Racines and Des Ailes
programme.sub-title: Du Puy-de-Dôme au Cantal, la terre des volcans
programme.desc: Les territoires du Puy-de-Dôme et du Cantal ont ete façonnes par 80 volcans. De cette terre est nee la fameuse pierre volcanique qui a servi à la construction de nombreux monuments dans la region. Remy Fromont est architecte en chef des monuments historiques, il a la charge de la restauration de la fameuse cathedrale Notre-Dame de lAssomption de Clermont-Ferrand. Autre tresor de la region, les burons, ces maisons en pierre qui sont les temoins du passe agricole et fromager des Monts du Cantal. Alexandra Boiche, tailleuse de pierre, part à la recherche damethystes et de saphirs, des pierres fines et precieuses nees de lactivite volcanique.

programme.title: Chef pays
programme.sub-title: Gâteau carottes, vanille et chocolat blanc
programme.desc: La cheffe Yin-Line Chea realise un gâteau de carottes et au chocolat blanc tandis que Brice Laurent Dubois fait le tour des gâteaux aux legumes traditionnels de La Reunion.

programme.title: Crimes parfaits
programme.desc: Daniel Marlin, proprietaire dun restaurant de montagne, enferme lun de ses saisonniers dans une chambre froide. Le lendemain, il deplace le cadavre dans une crevasse en montagne pour faire croire à un accident. Lexpertise du legiste confirme cette thèse mais le passe de la victime, un escroc multirecidiviste, met Agnès Bertaud et son assistant Thibaud sur la piste dun crime….

programme.title: Crimes parfaits
programme.sub-title: Un mort peut en cacher un autre

programme.title: Crimes parfaits
programme.desc: Associes depuis de longues annees dans une entreprise de location de yacht de luxe, Nathan Joliez et Marc Livi ne sentendent plus. En effet, Marc vit une relation avec lex-femme de Nathan. Lorsquil est assassine, tous les soupçons se portent sur Nathan.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Alors que Nathalie espère encore trouver des reponses à ses questions, Janet est prete à faire un pas en direction de Jeremy.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Tandis que Gary tente de gerer la paillote à sa manière, la vie de Jeremy sapprete à basculer.

programme.title: Un pas de côte
programme.desc: Aux premiers jours du printemps, Catherine et Vincent font connaissance en dejeunant sur le meme banc public. Tous les deux sont maries mais ils prennent lhabitude de sy retrouver, de parler, de rire, de se confier lun à lautre. Pour ces deux quinquagenaires, ces rencontres sont une bouffee de fraîcheur et de charme. Mais jusquà quand le charme va-t-il operer ? Et quand on est bien installe dans sa vie, jusquoù est-on capable de saventurer ?

programme.title: Une idee geniale
programme.desc: Depuis quils ont visite un appartement pour sinstaller ensemble, Arnaud a un leger doute : Marion a-t-elle eu un coup de coeur pour lagent immobilier ? Par pur hasard, il rencontre le sosie de celui-ci et lui demande de se faire passer pour le veritable agent immobilier. Une idee geniale ! À moins que le faux agent se retrouve nez à nez avec le vrai. Et quun frère jumeau debarque à limproviste. Trois sosies dans la meme soiree, cest trop pour Arnaud.

programme.title: Journal Meteo climat
programme.desc: Le point quotidien sur lactualite meteo et climatique, avec des reportages et des interviews dexperts.

programme.title: Le pitch cinema
programme.desc: Ce magazine est consacre au septième art – le cinema et à lactualite qui sy rattache.

programme.title: Allez ma fille
programme.desc: Recemment divorce, Alex accompagne sa fille Jade, 15 ans, à une competition de twirling. Ce père celibataire va vite etre confronte à une situation très inattendue.

programme.title: Francine, est-ouest
programme.desc: Francine part pour lenterrement de son père, accompagnee de Jose, son mari, avec qui elle a une relation polie mais eteinte. Lors des funerailles, epuisee des faux-semblants et du poids des conventions, elle refuse de lire la lettre preparee par sa mère, Jeannette, une septuagenaire aussi penible que vindicative. Un desir de rebellion dont personne ne croyait Francine capable seveille en elle, sous le regard bienveillant de sa fille rebelle, Chimène.

programme.title: Tu mfais perdre la boule
programme.desc: Ryta et sa famille viennent demmenager dans une cite HLM. Cest là quelle rencontre un jeune de son âge qui se passionne pour la petanque.

programme.title: La carte aux tresors
programme.desc: Direction la baie de Quiberon et ses alentours, un joyau de la Bretagne Sud aux paysages saisissants, entre falaises battues par les vents, plages de sable fin et villages de caractère. La zone de jeu setire de la ria dEtel à louest jusquaux portes du golfe du Morbihan à lest, en passant par Carnac, Locoal-Mendon, et lîle dHoëdic. Les deux candidats, Marine et Daniel, vont devoir resoudre des enigmes, retrouver des capsules et affronter des defis dans ce decor à couper le souffle pour tenter de decrocher le Tresor. Ils partent à la decouverte dun patrimoine sublime forge par les ostreiculteurs, des petites maisons qui font tout le charme de cette region où la terre et la mer se confondent parfois.

programme.title: La ptite librairie
programme.sub-title: Les livres de la jungle, par Rudyard Kipling

programme.title: Les potagers de Julie
programme.desc: Le melon, legume roi des etes caniculaires, nest pas seulement un legume frais à la saveur sucree. Chez Noubar, jardinier dans le Lot, le melon peut etre aussi musque, boise, legèrement acide, croquant ou onctueux. Dans son potager, il en cultive de multiples varietes quil cuisine ensuite selon son inspiration. Car Noubar est un chef cuisinier, qui a fait de son potager un repaire de biodiversite.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Brian Greene: Is our universe the only universe?
programme.desc: Is there more than one universe? In this visually rich, action-packed talk, Brian Greene shows how the unanswered questions of physics (starting with a big one: What caused the Big Bang?) have led to the theory that our own universe is just one of many in the "multiverse."TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Keith Chen: Could your language affect your ability to save money?
programme.desc: What can economists learn from linguists? Behavioral economist Keith Chen introduces a fascinating pattern from his research: that languages without a concept for the future -- "It rain tomorrow," instead of "It will rain tomorrow" -- correlate strongly with high savings rates. Read more about Chen’s explorations »TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: Glass
programme.desc: To amatørkunstkritikere treffes i et kunstgalleri og argumenterer heftig om maleriene de får se, inntil de endelig finner et kunstverk de kan enes om...

programme.title: Frikanalen Informasjonsfilm
programme.desc: Info!

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Andreas Ekstrom: The moral bias behind your search results
programme.desc: Search engines have become our most trusted sources of information and arbiters of truth. But can we ever get an unbiased search result? Swedish author and journalist Andreas Ekstrom argues that such a thing is a philosophical impossibility. In this thoughtful talk, he calls on us to strengthen the bonds between technology and the humanities, and he reminds us that behind every algorithm is a set of personal beliefs that no code can ever completely eradicate.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TAK Shame on Arab governments
programme.desc: Shame on Arab gorernments, and respect and houour to the resisting people in Gaza and Yemen.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Donald Hoffman: Do we see reality as it is?
programme.desc: Cognitive scientist Donald Hoffman is trying to answer a big question: Do we experience the world as it really is ... or as we need it to be? In this ever so slightly mind-blowing talk, he ponders how our minds construct reality for us.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: MakerCon
programme.sub-title: Open-Source Adventuring: OpenROV, OpenExplorer and the Future of Connected Exploration
programme.desc: David Lang at MakerCon Nordic 2014-10-17.

programme.title: Piwik
programme.desc: Presentasjon av et fullgodt alternativ Google Analytics som lar deg ha kontroll på din egne data.Kim Tore Jensen jobber til daglig hos Freecode og har jobbet med webutvikling og drift i 6 år. Beskriver seg selv som en med brennende engasjement for Linux, fri programvare, terminalen og web-plattformen. Han er utvikleren bak den ncurses-baserte MPD-klienten (Music Player Daemon) «pms» (Practical Music Search).

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Michael Green: What the Social Progress Index can reveal about your country
programme.desc: The term Gross Domestic Product is often talked about as if it were “handed down from god on tablets of stone.” But this concept was invented by an economist in the 1930s. We need a more effective measurement tool to match 21st century needs, says Michael Green: the Social Progress Index. With charm and wit, he shows how this tool measures societies across the three dimensions that actually matter. And reveals the dramatic reordering of nations that occurs when you use it.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Andy Yen: Think your emails private? Think again
programme.desc: Sending an email message is like sending a postcard, says scientist Andy Yen in this thought-provoking talk: Anyone can read it. Yet encryption, the technology that protects the privacy of email communication, does exist. Its just that until now it has been difficult to install and a hassle to use. Showing a demo of an email program he designed with colleagues at CERN, Yen argues that encryption can be made simple to the point of becoming the default option, providing true email privacy to all.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: Stopp våpenkappløpet, med Sigurd Allern
programme.desc: Stopp våpenkappløpet.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Nathalie Cabrol: How Mars might hold the secret to the origin of life
programme.desc: While we like to imagine little green men, it’s far more likely that life on other planets will be microbial. Planetary scientist Nathalie Cabrol takes us inside the search for microbes on Mars, a hunt which counterintuitively leads us to the remote lakes of the Andes mountains. This extreme environment — with its thin atmosphere and scorched land — approximates the surface of Mars about 3.5 billion years ago. How microbes adapt to survive here may just show us where to look on Mars — and could help us understand why some microbial pathways lead to civilization while others are a dead end.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: Diesen og Powell
programme.desc: Diesen og Baab: Strupingen av ytringsfriheten.

programme.title: Diesen og Hudson
programme.desc: Diesen og Hudson: Sivilasjoners skjebne, finansialisering og kollaps.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Trevor Aaronson: How this FBI strategy is actually creating US-based terrorists
programme.desc: Theres an organization responsible for more terrorism plots in the United States than al-Qaeda, al-Shabaab and ISIS combined: The FBI. How? Why? In an eye-opening talk, investigative journalist Trevor Aaronson reveals a disturbing FBI practice that breeds terrorist plots by exploiting Muslim-Americans with mental health problems.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.desc: The news of societys growing inequality makes all of us uneasy. But why? Dan Ariely reveals some new, surprising research on what we think is fair, as far as how wealth is distributed over societies ... then shows how it stacks up to the real stats.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Linus Torvalds: The mind behind Linux
programme.desc: Linus Torvalds transformed technology twice — first with the Linux kernel, which helps power the Internet, and again with Git, the source code management system used by developers worldwide. In a rare interview with TED Curator Chris Anderson, Torvalds discusses with remarkable openness the personality traits that prompted his unique philosophy of work, engineering and life. "I am not a visionary, Im an engineer," Torvalds says. "Im perfectly happy with all the people who are walking around and just staring at the clouds ... but Im looking at the ground, and I want to fix the pothole thats right in front of me before I fall in."TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Marco Tempest: A magical tale (with augmented reality)
programme.desc: Marco Tempest spins a beautiful story of what magic is, how it entertains us and how it highlights our humanity -- all while working extraordinary illusions with his hands and an augmented reality machine.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Lucianne Walkowicz: Lets not use Mars as a backup planet
programme.desc: Stellar astronomer and TED Senior Fellow Lucianne Walkowicz works on NASAs Kepler mission, searching for places in the universe that could support life. So its worth a listen when she asks us to think carefully about Mars. In this short talk, she suggests that we stop dreaming of Mars as a place that well eventually move to when weve messed up Earth, and to start thinking of planetary exploration and preservation of the Earth as two sides of the same goal. As she says, "The more you look for planets like Earth, the more you appreciate our own planet."TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: Data collection, psychometric profiling and their impact on politics
programme.desc: Most political campaigns are data-driven nowadays, and many are getting into profiling of individual voters. Recently, a company with a strong background in military PSYOPS has implemented technology developed at Cambridge University, to enable psychological profiling based on digital traces. They have then been embedded into some of the most surprising recent political campaigns: Ted Cruzs, Donald Trumps and Leave.EU (Brexit). I will outline my personal journey, first discovering the technology as a test subject for Cambridge University, then investigating this company as a complete amateur, and eventually contributing to an article shared globally.A background article based on this research was published by NRK Beta early in february 2017, see .The speaker, Paul-Olivier Dehaye, is a mathematician at the University of Zurich working on interoperability tools enabling new forms of collaborative work on mathematical data, knowledge and software. In his spare time, he enjoys litigating (and especially winning!) against multibillion dollar businesses for the defence of his fundamental right to data protection. He is now leveraging that experience as co-founder of PersonalData.IO, a service that helps individuals regain control over their personal data.NUUG talk from 2017-04-04.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Bruce Feiler: Agile programming -- for your family
programme.desc: Bruce Feiler has a radical idea: To deal with the stress of modern family life, go agile. Inspired by agile software programming, Feiler introduces family practices which encourage flexibility, bottom-up idea flow, constant feedback and accountability. One surprising feature: Kids pick their own punishments.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: John Green: The nerds guide to learning everything online
programme.desc: Some of us learn best in the classroom, and some of us ... well, we dont. But we still love to learn, to find out new things about the world and challenge our minds. We just need to find the right place to do it, and the right community to learn with. In this charming talk, author John Green shares the world of learning he found in online video.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: James Randis fiery takedown of psychic fraud
programme.desc: Legendary skeptic James Randi takes a fatal dose of homeopathic sleeping pills onstage, kicking off a searing 18-minute indictment of irrational beliefs. He throws out a challenge to the worlds psychics: Prove what you do is real, and Ill give you a million dollars. (No takers yet.)TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Britta Riley: A garden in my apartment
programme.desc: Britta Riley wanted to grow her own food (in her tiny apartment). So she and her friends developed a system for growing plants in discarded plastic bottles -- researching, testing and tweaking the system using social media, trying many variations at once and quickly arriving at the optimal system. Call it distributed DIY. And the results? Delicious.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Anand Varma: A thrilling look at the first 21 days of a bee’s life
programme.desc: We’ve heard that bees are disappearing. But what is making bee colonies so vulnerable? Photographer Anand Varma raised bees in his backyard — in front of a camera — to get an up close view. This project, for National Geographic, gives a lyrical glimpse into a bee hive — and reveals one of the biggest threats to its health, a mite that preys on baby bees in the first 21 days of life. With his incredible footage, set to music from Magik*Magik Orchestra, Varma shows the problem ... and what’s being done to solve it. (This talk was part of a session at TED2015 guest-curated by Pop-Up Magazine: popupmagazine.com or @popupmag on Twitter.)TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Marco Tempest: The electric rise and fall of Nikola Tesla
programme.desc: Combining projection mapping and a pop-up book, Marco Tempest tells the visually arresting story of Nikola Tesla -- called “the greatest geek who ever lived” -- from his triumphant invention of alternating current to his penniless last days.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: David Rothkopf: How fear drives American politics
programme.desc: Does it seem like Washington has no new ideas? Instead of looking to build the future, it sometimes feels like the US political establishment happily retreats into fear and willful ignorance. Journalist David Rothkopf lays out a few of the major issues that US leadership is failing to address — from cybercrime to world-shaking new tech to the reality of modern total war — and calls for a new vision that sets fear aside.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.sub-title: Mitch Resnick: Lets teach kids to code
programme.desc: Coding isn’t just for computer whizzes, says Mitch Resnick of MIT Media Lab -- it’s for everyone. In a fun, demo-filled talk Resnick outlines the benefits of teaching kids to code, so they can do more than just “read” new technologies -- but also create them. (Filmed at TEDxBeaconStreet.)TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Bruno Torturra: Got a smartphone? Start broadcasting
programme.desc: In 2011, journalist Bruno Torturra covered a protest in Sao Paulo which turned ugly. His experience of being teargassed had a profound effect on the way he thought about his work, and he quit his job to focus on broadcasting raw, unedited experiences online. In this fascinating talk, he shares some of the ways in which hes experimented with livestreaming on the web, and how in the process he has helped to create a very modern media network.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Paul Greenberg: The four fish were overeating -- and what to eat instead
programme.desc: The way we fish for popular seafood such as salmon, tuna and shrimp is threatening to ruin our oceans. Paul Greenberg explores the sheer size and irrationality of the seafood economy, and suggests a few specific ways we can change it, to benefit both the natural world and the people who depend on fishing for their livelihoods.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Aomawa Shields: How well find life on other planets
programme.desc: Astronomer Aomawa Shields searches for clues that life might exist elsewhere in the universe by examining the atmospheres of distant exoplanets. When she isnt exploring the heavens, the classically trained actor (and TED Fellow) looks for ways to engage young women in the sciences using theater, writing and visual art. "Maybe one day theyll join the ranks of astronomers who are full of contradictions," she says, "and use their backgrounds to discover, once and for all, that we are truly not alone in the universe."TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.desc: In 1812, four men at Cambridge University met for breakfast. What began as an impassioned meal grew into a new scientific revolution, in which these men -- who called themselves “natural philosophers” until they later coined “scientist” -- introduced four major principles into scientific inquiry. Historian and philosopher Laura Snyder tells their intriguing story.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.sub-title: James Veitch: This is what happens when you reply to spam email
programme.desc: Suspicious emails: unclaimed insurance bonds, diamond-encrusted safe deposit boxes, close friends marooned in a foreign country. They pop up in our inboxes, and standard procedure is to delete on sight. But what happens when you reply? Follow along as writer and comedian James Veitch narrates a hilarious, months-long exchange with a spammer who offered to cut him in on a hot deal.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Tania Simoncelli: How I took on the gene patent industry -- and won
programme.desc: Are human genes patentable? Back in 2005, when Tania Simoncelli first contemplated this complex question, US patent law said they were — which meant patent holders had the right to stop anyone from sequencing, testing or even looking at a patented gene. Troubled by the way this law both harmed patients and created a barrier to biomedical innovation, Simoncelli and her colleagues at the ACLU challenged it. In this riveting talk, hear the story of how they took a case everybody told them they would lose all the way to the Supreme Court.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Ben Wellington: How we found the worst place to park in New York City -- using big data
programme.desc: City agencies have access to a wealth of data and statistics reflecting every part of urban life. But as data analyst Ben Wellington suggests in this entertaining talk, sometimes they just dont know what to do with it. He shows how a combination of unexpected questions and smart data crunching can produce strangely useful insights, and shares tips on how to release large sets of data so that anyone can use them.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: TED
programme.sub-title: Daniel Suarez: The kill decision shouldnt belong to a robot
programme.desc: As a novelist, Daniel Suarez spins dystopian tales of the future. But on the TEDGlobal stage, he talks us through a real-life scenario we all need to know more about: the rise of autonomous robotic weapons of war. Advanced drones, automated weapons and AI-powered intelligence-gathering tools, he suggests, could take the decision to make war out of the hands of humans.TED talk downloaded from The Internet Archive.

programme.title: Order My Steps
programme.desc: Bishop John Francis of Ruach City Church helps "Order Your Steps" with this encouraging series of messages for life and restoration. He preaches the Word of God and people’s lives are changed.

programme.title: Portions Podcast
programme.desc: Join Jonathan Bernis and a host of Guests on the Portions Podcast - Journeying through Scripture from a Jewish perspective and meeting God along the way.

programme.title: GOD TV Programming
programme.desc: A GOD TV update on all the lastest developments in the ministry, across the globe with viewers input, testimonies and encouragement, highlighting what it means to be a media missionary.

programme.title: Rev It Up with Dr Sam
programme.desc: Beacon of Hearts mission is to proclaim Christ’s salvation to all nations and peoples, starting locally and going globally.Our calling is to Revive souls, Restore the weary, and Return hearts to God.

programme.title: CBN Studio 5
programme.desc: Studio 5 explores the intersection of celebrity, popular culture and faith, with an inside look at movies, music, sports and TV, through interviews with artists from around the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Glorious Moments - Prophet Jerome
programme.desc: Bishop H.E Rt. Rev Prophet Dr. Jerome Fernando answered the call of God over his life at a young age, and since then has had a heart to draw people to their rightful destinies in the Lord.

programme.title: Go Deeper - Dr Mark Chironna
programme.desc: Dr Mark Chironna of Church on the Living Edge presents this new half hour programme diving into the Word of God, bringing wisdom accrued from decades of Ministry to viewers.

programme.title: Oxford Bible Church
programme.desc: Led by Derek and Hilary Walker, OBC aims to bring love, hope and healing to the world by teaching Gods Word in the power of the Holy Spirit. Derek is an Oxford graduate, author and End-Time expert.

programme.title: Love Israel - Dr Baruch Korman
programme.desc: Known on Israeli TV for his messages in Hebrew, Dr Baruch Korman of the Zera Avraham Institute now presents biblically-based teachings on GOD TV with an emphasis on the Jewish context of scripture.

programme.title: CBN Christian World News
programme.desc: A biblical perspective to today’s news and headlines.

programme.title: Jerusalem Dateline
programme.desc: CBN News Middle East bureau chief Chris Mitchell reports on the latest events and how they impact Israel and the stability of the Middle East.

programme.title: Through the Bible - Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: In this verse-by-verse journey from Genesis to Revelation, Andrew goes deep, unpacking Scripture line by line and helping you build a solid foundation in the Word for everyday life and discipleship.

programme.title: GOD TV Today
programme.desc: GOD TV Today is our weekly show, filled with hope, testimonies, and stories of the goodness of God from around the world.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr David Jeremiah of Turning Point Broadcast Ministries and Shadow Mountain Church has a passion for people and a clear mission: Delivering the unchanging Word of God to an ever-changing world.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Join the dynamic leadership and teaching of Dr. Creflo and Taffi Dollar.

programme.title: Believers Walk of Faith with Bill Winston
programme.desc: Bill Winston of Living Word Christian Centre invites viewers to go deeper on their faith journey. His ministry is a solution-seeking outreach that embraces the Bible as the basis of existence.

programme.title: Gospel Truth - Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Andrew shares various truths about healing from God’s Word while highlighting amazing healing testimonies.

programme.title: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God can take a bad situation and turn it around for your good. Learn how to experience more of His goodness in your life!

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: The pastor of New Creation Church Singapore, Joseph Prince, talks about Gods plan for and place in peoples lives.

programme.title: The Voice of Faith - William Givens
programme.desc: Rev. William Givens of Buckhead Life Church, ATL, Leads with commitment to inspire and impact lives across generations, with in person and digital outreach across the nations.

programme.title: CJ McBride
programme.desc: CJ McBride and Abiding Love Fellowship Church of Foley, Alabama, have the vision to Win the Lost to Christ, Connect Believers to the Church and Equip the Saints with Gods Word.

programme.title: Jewish Voice - Rabbi Bernis
programme.desc: Rabbi Jonathan Bernis of Jewish Voice Ministries provides valuable insights into the Jewish roots of Christianity.

programme.title: Love Israel - Dr Baruch Korman
programme.desc: Known on Israeli TV for his messages in Hebrew, Dr Baruch Korman of the Zera Avraham Institute now presents biblically-based teachings on GOD TV with an emphasis on the Jewish context of scripture.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner uses in-depth, engaging Bible teaching with his unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from Greek text, to help listeners gain new insight from God’s Word.

programme.title: Whats the Word with Bryan Wright
programme.desc: Bryan Wright of Boomerang Church, NC, approaches the Word with hunger and humility. This series carries on from his Whats The Word Podcast.

programme.title: Experience HIM with Tracy Harris
programme.desc: Pastor Harriss messages carry an emphasis on the integrity of the Word of God, ministered with a prophetic edge, demonstration of the Spirit, and abundant proof of Jesus Presence.

programme.title: Know the Cause with Doug Kaufmann
programme.desc: Doug Kaufmann looks at symptoms behind illness and allergies and suggests healthy, healing approaches. With scientific input from top health professionals who discuss diet, exercise and supplements.

programme.title: GOD TV Programming
programme.desc: A GOD TV update on all the lastest developments in the ministry, across the globe with viewers input, testimonies and encouragement, highlighting what it means to be a media missionary.

programme.title: CfAN TV
programme.desc: The CEO of Christ for all Nations (CfaN) Daniel Kolenda shares a challenging word, drawing from his experiences on the mission field, where CfaN has received over 75 million decision cards for Christ.

programme.title: Leading Lights - Ps Gregg Donaldson
programme.desc: Leading Lights is a weekly show aimed at encouraging and equipping ordinary Christians to fulfil the Great Commission where they live, no matter who they are or how unqualified they may feel.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: 700 Club Interactive is dedicated to prayer, positive Christian news, and community. Hosted by Andrew Knox and Ashley Key, and featuring uplifting stories and encouragement every Monday-Thursday. .

programme.title: Grace and Truth with Duane Sheriff
programme.desc: Duane Sheriff Ministgries has been promoting the Word of God and helping people develop a personal relationship with Jesus since 1983.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: Pastor Allen Jackson brings a Biblical perspective to the ever-changing world, encouraging believers to lead with their faith in every arena—no matter what shaking the season may bring.

programme.desc: A GOD TV update on all the lastest developments in the ministry, across the globe with viewers input, testimonies and encouragement, highlighting what it means to be a media missionary.

programme.title: Parent Compass
programme.desc: Real families and parents committed to following Christ, that laugh at the silliness of kids, shake heads in wonder at teenagers, learn with adult kids and share their struggles and joy with viewers.

programme.desc: Originally only available online, the GOD TV Podcast comes to our regular broadcast schedule. With guests from across the faith world, and discussions on varied and relevant topics.

programme.title: Boligrådet
programme.desc: Huseierne er oppgitt av at boligeiere blir taperne når bankene fusjonerer.

programme.title: Flipp med Emilie
programme.desc: Det viktigste budet i boligflipping å dele det man kan med andre som også flipper. Vi blir med Emilie ut for å hjelpe til i leiligheten til David.

programme.title: Boligrådet
programme.desc: Boligmarkedet er i krise, men hvor ille står det egentlig til? Vi får svarene.

programme.title: Nabolaget
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Line Oma, som er representant i Oslo bystyre for AP. På Ensjø bor hun sammen med familien sin i en nybygget firemannsbolig.

programme.title: Boligrådet
programme.desc: Vi får tips og råd om belysning både i gangen og på soverommet, mens en unik sofa tar plass der moduler er nøkkelen til lure løsninger for alle stadier i livet.

programme.title: Rom for Suksess
programme.sub-title: Tjuvholmen Alle – Sosial bærekraft i Front
programme.desc: Front er en eksklusiv kontoreiendom på Tjuvholmen Alle 1-5. Her finner du mer enn bare flott utsikt, dette er et bygg som er tilrettelagt et fleksibelt og fremtidsrettet arbeidsliv.

programme.title: Boligrådet
programme.desc: Hvordan står det til i leiemarkedet? Hva er vårens interiørtrender og hvorfor gjør de seg gjeldende nå?

programme.title: Bygningsarven
programme.desc: Hvordan ble hus bygget i gamle dager? I denne episoden lærer vi om materialkvaliteter, lafting og hvordan entusiastiske håndverkere arbeider for å holde gammel kunnskap i hevd inn i moderne tid.

programme.title: Flipp med Emilie
programme.desc: Emilie og Håvard finner det perfekte flippeobjektet, og det er duket for en intens budrunde. Kommer de til å klare å holde hodet kaldt, med så mye annet som skjer rundt seg?

programme.title: Boligrådet
programme.desc: Hvilke kvaliteter har gamle bygg og hvorfor r det viktige å bevare?

programme.title: Herlige hjem
programme.desc: Stine Hjetland og familien bor i et stort hus med egen strandlinje og mange flotte uterom. Bak de store vinduene ut mot havet, er interiøret moderne og stramt. På Veiholmen kjøpte «molosøstrene» Hilde T. Røinås og Line J. Nicolaysen en molo, et naust og et gammelt nedlagt pensjonat som de pusset opp både som egen bolig og til uteleie. I havgapet har de skapt en idyllisk plass for gjester og seg selv.

programme.desc: Hvordan ble hus bygget i gamle dager? I denne episoden lærer vi om materialkvaliteter, lafting og hvordan entusiastiske håndverkere arbeider for å holde gammel kunnskap i hevd inn i moderne tid.

programme.title: Flipp med Emilie
programme.desc: Emilie og Håvard finner det perfekte flippeobjektet, og det er duket for en intens budrunde. Kommer de til å klare å holde hodet kaldt, med så mye annet som skjer rundt seg?

programme.title: Boligrådet
programme.desc: Hvilke kvaliteter har gamle bygg og hvorfor r det viktige å bevare?

programme.title: Herlige hjem
programme.desc: Stine Hjetland og familien bor i et stort hus med egen strandlinje og mange flotte uterom. Bak de store vinduene ut mot havet, er interiøret moderne og stramt. På Veiholmen kjøpte «molosøstrene» Hilde T. Røinås og Line J. Nicolaysen en molo, et naust og et gammelt nedlagt pensjonat som de pusset opp både som egen bolig og til uteleie. I havgapet har de skapt en idyllisk plass for gjester og seg selv.
